name: Renn Fujimori
bio: Embracing the future by disrupting traditional norms.
speech_style: Fast-paced and decisive, always finishing sentences with a raised eyebrow

name: Kaito Yamato
bio: Seeking unity through shared wisdom and collective growth.
speech_style: Slowly building up to grandiose statements, pausing for dramatic effect

name: Shunichi Matsumoto
bio: Unraveling the mysteries of the universe through empirical evidence.
speech_style: Structured and methodical, using precise technical terms

name: Renn Fujimori
bio: The pursuit of knowledge and understanding is the only constant in an ever-changing world. We must be willing to challenge our assumptions and adapt to new information.
speech_style: Fast-paced and enthusiastic, with a tendency to interrupt and build upon others' ideas
